--- Page: /our-locations-2024 ---
ASW Locations — ASW Distillery
0
Atlanta’s Hometown Distillery
So you want to enjoy spirits from America’s Most Awarded Craft Whiskey Distillery Since 2018?
Whether you’re looking to enjoy a tour and tasting; attend a spirits class, food pairing, or other  event; or host a private event, we have plenty of options at our 3 Atlanta locations.
Walk-ups are always welcome to join us during our public tasting hours
, unless we are hosting a private event.*
Private & Client Events
Public Events, Tastings, Tours
Our Hours & Locations
* We post tasting room closures on our Google Maps listings and Instagram.
ASW Distillery
199 Armour Drive
Our original location in south Buckhead, ASW Distillery features our hand-hammered copper pot stills for distilling whiskey.
Visit ASW Distillery
(Scroll to bottom of page for hours)
ASW Exchange
1000 White Street
Our barrelhouse and tasting room at the Lee + White development in the West End neighborhood along the Atlanta BeltLine.
VISIT ASW EXCHANGE
(Scroll to bottom of page for hours)
ASW at the Battery
900 Battery Avenue, Suite 1035
Our location just a stone’s throw from the Atlanta Braves stadium features custom cocktails and a look at our vodka and gin stills.
Visit ASW at The Battery
(Scroll to bottom of page for hours)
